notCovered: confidence / source / reason — derived grades have no ground truth; never assert them
authType is asserted against STATIC detection only (agent phase excluded) — see TD-166
_unfilled: STRUCTURE ONLY — the harness reports this app as INVALID/UNFILLED until Raj fills it. Raj supplies: verifiedBy, verifiedOn (ISO date), and expected[]. Each expected entry = { field, assert, value|values, basis }. field ∈ renderingModel|authType|crawlStrategy|appName|baseUrl|loginUrl|signals.<name>. assert ∈ equals|notEquals|oneOf|atLeast|atMost|present|absent. basis is REQUIRED (why the value is known). Signals available (names carry their definition, ADR-021 §2): signals.frameworkMountPointCount, signals.frameworkScriptCount, signals.rawDomAnchorCount, signals.formCount, signals.passwordFieldCount, signals.sameOriginNavigableLinkCount, signals.jsClickableCount. High-leverage starter (VALUE IS RAJ'S TO FILL): signals.frameworkMountPointCount atLeast 1 (SauceDemo has <div id="root">, verified). NOTE: renderingModel (framework-rendered|static-rendered|unknown) is the observable rendering field, added by the TD-163/ADR-021 refactor. appType is NOT an observable field — the platform is a structural fact of the execution context (ruling 2026-07-21), removed from the answer-key entirely.
